scripts.build: node --input-type=module --eval "import { copyFileSync, mkdirSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --input-type=module --eval "import { copyFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/db', { recursive: true }); copyFileSync('src/db/schema.sql', 'dist/db/schema.sql');"
